title: Immunogenicity and Safety of AS03-adjuvanted H5N1 Influenza Vaccine in Children 6-35 Months of Age: Results From a Phase 2, Randomized, Observer-blind, Multicenter, Dose-ranging Study.
summary: A phase 2, randomized, observer-blind, multicenter, dose-ranging study evaluating the immunogenicity and safety of different formulations of an AS03-adjuvanted H5N1 influenza vaccine in children aged 6–35 months.
key_findings: 1.9 µg HA/AS03B provided the most favorable balance of immunogenicity versus reactogenicity.
Antibody levels persisted >4 times above baseline 12 months after primary vaccination with all formulations.
Incidence of fever ranged from 28.6% to 60.5% depending on the formulation.
study_design: Phase 2, randomized, observer-blind, multicenter, dose-ranging study
